prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic awards-ceremony still of John C. Swaggert, a silver-haired male actor in a black tuxedo with a white shirt, pale silver tie, and white pocket square, standing behind an elegant black-and-gold podium on a grand theater stage. His face is covered by a flat skin-toned rectangular privacy mask, and the audience faces are similarly obscured with small skin-toned blocks. He raises a large ornate gold trophy in his left hand: a circular Vitruvian-man style statuette inside a ring with small round holes, mounted on a black base with a gold nameplate reading "THE VITRUVIAN CINEMATIC ACHIEVEMENT AWARD." The podium front also reads "THE VITRUVIAN CINEMATIC ACHIEVEMENT AWARD" in gold serif lettering with a gold eagle emblem beneath it. Behind him, place a huge draped American flag filling the left background, and on the right a large black stage screen with gold serif text reading "The 97th Da Vinci Awards" plus a small gold eagle icon. Add a single black microphone at center, warm chandelier lights, golden architectural details, spotlights cutting through haze, bokeh audience applause in formal evening wear, and a luxurious patriotic gala atmosphere. Use a wide 4:3 composition, shallow depth of field, realistic lens perspective, rich warm lighting, crisp trophy details, and high-end broadcast-event photography style.
